rationale: t0012's smoke result showed FrontierScience-Olympiad is at the floor for haiku without tools (A: 2.5%, B: 0%, C: 0%). FrontierMath access from Epoch AI does not address the floor problem — model capacity and tool availability matter more than benchmark expansion. Phase 2 confirmatory work (t0023) targets SWE-bench Verified instead. Demoted from high to medium.
